titleStmt.title: SII 22.389: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 389. (A.R. No. 389 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. ROCK-CUT ŚIVA TEMPLE—AT THE ENTRANCE, RIGHT SIDE. MĀR. TRIBH. SUNDARAPĀṆḌYADĒVA—8th YEAR.

summary.p: This is damaged, and the last few lines are built in. It records an allotment of four pieces of land tax-free in favour of four priests of the temple of Tirumeyyattu Mahādēva by the Sabhā of the place, for the conduct of a festival on the day of Makhā in Māśi month. This is stated to be in lieu of 30 kalam of paddy they were till now paying to the temple every year evidently as interest on ten paḻaṅkāśu which had been originally invested with them as endowment for that purpose, by a sāmanta (feudatory) of the Chōḷa king Rājarāja (III?) by name Iruñjiṟai-uḍaiyāṉ

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉa cakkaravatti
kaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Avatu kāṉaṉāṭṭu
tevatāṉam brahmadeyam tirumeyyattu sabhaiyom
tirumeyyattu mahātevaṟku muṉpu Irāca Irāca tevar
tu sāmantaril Iruñciṟai Uṭaiyāṉ Eṅkaḷ pakkal tirunā
ttukku tanta paḻaṅkācu 10 Ipaḻaṅkācu pattukkum
nellu muppatiṉ kalamāka tirumeyyattu mahātevaṟkku tiru
yattu sabhaiyom Aḷantu pontamaiyil Ina
mum koṇṭu Ikkoyiṟttāṉattār māci makam ti ḻunta
ruḷivittu varukaiyāl Ik koyiṟbhāradvāji ve
par rājarāja paṭṭaṉum muṉṉūṟu va paṭṭa
ra paṭṭaṉum Iṉṉāl varum taṅkaḷ peril Iṟut nilatti
l Ivar Āvaṇi mātam Ūril A
mā nilattukku Accu Oppukko po
tuvāna nilam ve maiyil Ippaḻaṅkācu
kaḷ ttil cuṟṟu pāḻil sabhaippotuvā
ṭi nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Ivarkaḷ
Āṉa nilattil Ivvūr teṉpiṭākai pāp
ci tevivayakkal nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi
yum paramanvayakkal nilam Araimā muntirikai
yum puñcey nilam kāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mukkālum Ā
loṭu neṭuṅkaṇ ṇilam Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiyum Ā
ka Ittaṭi nāliṉāl virivunilam Iraṇṭumāviṉ kiḻ
mukkāṇi Iṉṉālil tarappaṭi Araimāviṉ kiḻ muṉ ti
ḷikkum Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṉṉilaṅkaḷukku � kaḷ ka
ṭamai lāka Accuvari viṉiokam Eccoṟu māṟṟari
ci veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ nāṭṭu viṉiyokam Ūrva mum
maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭatuvum tevark kaṭamai
nāṅkaḷe Iṉṉilattukku Iṟuttuvaruvomākavum
tevarkaḷ kaṭamai Iṉṉilaṅkaḷukku tāṅkaḷe yaḷap
parkaḷākavum Ittarappaṭi nilam Araimāviṉk kiḻ muṉṟu
mā mukkālukku candrādityavaṟ nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttu po
tu vomākavum tirumeyyattu sabhaiyom tiruṉā
ḷubhaiyamāka Aḷantu varukiṟa nellu muppatiṉ kala
ttukkum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷile ceytu kuṭuttum Iṟu
nilattil sabhaipotu va
ṅ kaṭṭu kkuṭuttu tirumey
laṅkaḷ koṇṭu Ikkoyil
tāka tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi vi
ttavaṟ celvatāka kalveṭṭi
ru meyyattu
Digital edition of SII 22.389 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
